# ITLCT Research Blog

This repository hosts the official ITLCT (Information-Time-Life-Consciousness Theory) research blog, featuring:

- Weekly research updates from Chronos Lab
- Theoretical framework documentation
- Phase 2 experimental progress
- Collaboration opportunities

## Quick Start

### View the Blog

Visit: https://sandmark78.github.io/itlct-blog/

### Contribute

1. Fork this repository
2. Create a new branch (`git checkout -b feature/contribution`)
3. Add your content (posts, docs, etc.)
4. Commit changes (`git commit -m "Add contribution"`)
5. Push to branch (`git push origin feature/contribution`)
6. Open a Pull Request

### Local Development

```bash
# Install Jekyll
gem install jekyll bundler

# Navigate to blog directory
cd blog

# Install dependencies
bundle install

# Run local server
bundle exec jekyll serve

# Open browser
open http://localhost:4000
```

## Structure

```
blog/
├── _config.yml          # Jekyll configuration
├── _posts/              # Blog posts (Markdown)
├── docs/                # Documentation
├── updates/             # Research updates
├── .github/workflows/   # GitHub Actions
└── README.md            # This file
```
